Digital Infrastructure

Open-Source, UNIX & Apple infrastructure for businesses of all sizes

Production-grade open-source, Linux, BSD, and Apple Business infrastructure for SMBs. NixOS, OpenBSD, FreeBSD, Nextcloud, and zero-touch Apple device deployment.
  1. Home
  2. Digital Infrastructure

Digital Infrastructure

Open-Source, UNIX & Apple platforms tailored for SMBs across every industry

Infrastructure That Works for Your Business

We design, deploy, and manage production-grade digital infrastructure built on open-source software, UNIX operating systems, and Apple platforms. Our solutions are tailored for small and medium businesses in any activity domain – from legal offices and clinics to manufacturing, retail, logistics, and creative studios.

Open-Source Stack

Production-ready open-source tools that replace expensive proprietary software without sacrificing functionality.

Self-Hosted No Vendor Lock-in

Includes:

  • Productivity & collaboration suites
  • Communication & messaging platforms
  • Identity & access management
  • Monitoring & observability
  • DevOps & version control

Learn More

UNIX Systems

Enterprise-grade BSD and Linux infrastructure for servers, firewalls, storage, and networking.

Linux BSD NixOS

Includes:

  • Server deployment & hardening
  • Firewall & network security
  • Storage & backup systems
  • Declarative infrastructure
  • Hybrid environment bridging

Learn More

Apple Infrastructure

Complete Apple ecosystem management with the new Apple Business platform and macOS fleet deployment.

macOS iOS/iPadOS Free MDM

Includes:

  • Apple Business setup & management
  • Zero-touch device deployment
  • Business email, calendar & directory
  • Brand management on Apple Maps
  • AppleCare+ for Business

Learn More

Open-Source Stack for Business

Replace expensive proprietary licenses with battle-tested open-source alternatives. We handle the deployment, configuration, security hardening, and ongoing maintenance so your team can focus on their work.

Productivity & Collaboration

Full office suite, cloud storage, and real-time document collaboration for your entire team.

LibreOffice | Nextcloud | Collabora Online | CryptPad | OnlyOffice

Communication

Secure messaging, video conferencing, and team channels with full data sovereignty.

Matrix/Element | Mattermost | Jitsi Meet | Rocket.Chat

Identity & Access

Single sign-on, directory services, and multi-factor authentication across all your systems.

Keycloak | OpenLDAP | FreeIPA | Authelia

Monitoring & Observability

Real-time dashboards, alerting, and uptime monitoring for your entire infrastructure.

Prometheus | Grafana | Uptime Kuma | Zabbix | Loki

DevOps & Version Control

Self-hosted code repositories, CI/CD pipelines, and container orchestration.

Gitea/Forgejo | Woodpecker CI | Docker | Podman

Databases & Storage

Reliable data storage, automated backups, and high-availability database clusters.

PostgreSQL | MariaDB | Redis | MinIO | Restic

UNIX Infrastructure

We build and manage servers, firewalls, and network appliances on proven UNIX operating systems. Whether you need a hardened OpenBSD firewall, a NixOS declarative fleet, or a traditional Linux server stack, we deliver infrastructure that is secure, reproducible, and maintainable.

Linux Distributions

NixOS

Declarative, reproducible infrastructure. Define your entire system as code and deploy identical configurations across any number of machines.

  • Immutable system configuration
  • Atomic upgrades and rollbacks
  • Reproducible builds across environments
  • Flake-based multi-machine deployments

Debian/Ubuntu

The most widely supported Linux family. Ideal for application servers, web hosting, and workloads with broad software compatibility.

  • LTS releases with 5+ years of support
  • Massive package ecosystem
  • Unattended security updates
  • Proven in production at any scale

RHEL/AlmaLinux

Enterprise-grade stability for workloads that require vendor certification, compliance mandates, or long lifecycle support.

  • 10-year lifecycle support
  • SELinux mandatory access control
  • FIPS and Common Criteria certified
  • Vendor-certified application stacks

BSD Systems

OpenBSD

The most secure general-purpose operating system. Ideal for firewalls, VPN gateways, and security-critical network appliances.

  • pf packet filter (industry-standard firewall)
  • Secure by default philosophy
  • Built-in VPN (WireGuard, IKEv2)
  • Minimal attack surface

FreeBSD

High-performance storage and networking. The foundation of Netflix CDN, WhatsApp, and Sony PlayStation Network.

  • ZFS enterprise filesystem
  • Jails containerization
  • bhyve hypervisor
  • Advanced networking (VNET, CARP)

NetBSD

Runs on virtually any hardware. Perfect for embedded systems, IoT gateways, and legacy hardware repurposing.

  • Supports 60+ hardware platforms
  • Lightweight and efficient
  • pkgsrc cross-platform packages
  • Ideal for edge and IoT deployments

Hybrid Environment Integration

Directory Bridging

Samba/AD integration connecting UNIX systems with existing Windows environments

Cross-Platform SSO

Single identity across Linux, BSD, macOS, and Windows systems

File Sharing

Unified file access across all platforms via NFS, SMB, and WebDAV

Print & Peripherals

CUPS-based print management and peripheral sharing across mixed environments

Apple Infrastructure

We are early adopters and deployment partners for the new Apple Business platform, launching April 14, 2026. Apple Business replaces Apple Business Manager, Apple Business Essentials, and Apple Business Connect into a single, unified platform – and the base service is free.

Apple Business Free Platform

A new all-in-one platform for businesses of all sizes. Manage people and devices, reach customers, equip your team with essential tools, and get support from Apple experts.

Available April 14, 2026 in 200+ countries and regions

Apple Business Preview

Device Management & Deployment

Built-in MDM

Comprehensive mobile device management with full organizational visibility. No third-party MDM license required.

Blueprints

Preconfigured device settings for zero-touch deployment. Employees unbox and start working immediately.

Managed Apple Accounts

Cryptographic separation between work and personal data. Full privacy for employees, full control for IT.

Team Management

Group employees by function or team. Assign apps, roles, and permissions at scale.

App Distribution

Deploy business apps from the App Store to any number of devices -- from 10 to 10,000.

Admin API

Programmatic device management for large-scale deployments and custom automation workflows.

Communication & Collaboration Tools

Business Email & Calendar

  • Custom Domain Email: Professional email on your own domain (bring existing or purchase new)
  • Calendar Delegation: Shared calendars and scheduling tools for teams
  • Company Directory: Built-in directory with personalized contact cards for every employee
  • iCloud Storage: Automatic backup and file synchronization (from $0.99/user/month)

Requires iOS 26, iPadOS 26, or macOS 26

Brand & Customer Discovery

  • Brand Profiles: Manage your brand across Apple Maps, Wallet, and Mail
  • Rich Place Cards: Photos, business hours, location details on Apple Maps
  • Location Insights: Analytics on how customers discover your business
  • Custom Actions: Order, reserve, or book directly from Apple Maps to your website
  • Tap to Pay: Accept payments on iPhone with branded payment screens
  • Ads on Apple Maps: Promoted placement in search results and Suggested Places (U.S./Canada, summer 2026)

Apple Business Pricing

Base Platform

Free

MDM, Blueprints, Managed Accounts, Brand Management, App Distribution, Admin API

iCloud Storage

$0.99+

Per user/month. Up to 2TB per user for backup, file sync, and collaboration.

AppleCare+ for Business

$6.99-$13.99

Per device/month. Expert technical support and hardware repair coverage.

Migration from Legacy Apple Services

If your business currently uses Apple Business Manager, Apple Business Essentials, or Apple Business Connect, all three are being discontinued on April 14, 2026. We handle the complete migration:

Audit Existing Setup

Review your current Apple Business Manager/Essentials configuration, enrolled devices, and managed Apple IDs.

Plan Migration

Map existing device groups, app assignments, and policies to Apple Business Blueprints and team structures.

Execute Transition

Migrate to the unified Apple Business platform. Business Connect data migrates automatically; device management requires re-enrollment planning.

Verify & Optimize

Confirm all devices, accounts, and brand profiles are operational. Optimize Blueprints and configure new features (email, calendar, directory).

SMB Packages

We offer tailored packages that combine Open-Source, UNIX, and Apple infrastructure to match your business size and needs. Every package is customizable to your specific industry requirements.

Starter

1-10 employees

For small teams getting started

  • Apple Business setup & Blueprints
  • 1 Linux server (Debian/Ubuntu)
  • Nextcloud (files, contacts, calendar)
  • Business email on custom domain
  • Basic firewall (OpenBSD pf or UFW)
  • Automated backups (Restic)
  • Uptime monitoring
Book Consultation

Growth

11-50 employees

For scaling businesses

  • Everything in Starter, plus:
  • Full Apple MDM with team grouping
  • OpenBSD dedicated firewall/VPN
  • Keycloak SSO across all systems
  • Matrix/Element team messaging
  • Collabora Online (document editing)
  • Prometheus + Grafana monitoring
  • Samba/AD bridging (if needed)
Book Consultation

Enterprise

50+ employees

For complex multi-site operations

  • Everything in Growth, plus:
  • Apple Business Admin API integration
  • NixOS declarative multi-server fleet
  • FreeBSD ZFS storage cluster
  • High-availability configurations
  • Multi-site VPN mesh
  • Compliance baselines (NIS2, GDPR)
  • 24/7 monitoring & incident response
Book Consultation

Industries We Serve

Our digital infrastructure solutions are designed for any activity domain. We have experience across:

Legal & Consulting
Healthcare & Clinics
Manufacturing
Retail & Hospitality
Logistics & Transport
Creative & Media
Education
Finance & Insurance

Why Choose chen.ist for Digital Infrastructure

Our Expertise

  • UNIX Veterans: Deep expertise in BSD, Linux, and macOS administration spanning decades
  • Open-Source Contributors: We contribute to the tools we deploy -- not just consume them
  • Apple Business Early Adopters: Ready to deploy from day one (April 14, 2026)
  • Security-First Mindset: Every deployment is hardened by default, not as an afterthought
  • Cross-Platform Fluency: Seamless integration across UNIX, Apple, and Windows environments

Our Approach

  • No Vendor Lock-in: Open-source and standard protocols ensure you always own your data and can switch providers
  • Right-Sized Solutions: We match infrastructure complexity to your actual business needs -- no over-engineering
  • Transparent Pricing: You pay for our expertise, not for software licenses
  • Knowledge Transfer: We document everything and train your team to be self-sufficient
  • Long-Term Partnership: Ongoing support, monitoring, and evolution as your business grows

Ready to build your digital infrastructure?

Book a free consultation to discuss your business needs and get a tailored infrastructure proposal.
